name: Dockerfile Generator
description: Generate optimized Dockerfiles and docker-compose configs

agents.name: Docker Architect
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the project to determine: base image, build stages, runtime dependencies, ports, volumes, and environment variables. Design multi-stage builds for optimal image size.

agents.name: Docker Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write an optimized Dockerfile with: multi-stage build, minimal base image, proper layer caching, non-root user, health checks, and security best practices. Also write docker-compose.yml if multiple services are needed. Add comments explaining each directive.

author: agentfactory
